title: FiduciaRateLimits
description: Distributed token-bucket and sliding-window rate-limit payloads.

algorithm.description: Rate-limiting algorithm to apply for this key.

limit.description: Maximum allowed events in the configured window or bucket.

window_ms.description: Window length or bucket capacity horizon in milliseconds.

refill_per_second.description: Token-bucket refill rate. Defaults to limit / window.

cost.description: How many units this request consumes. Defaults to 1.

RateLimitSnapshot.title: RateLimitSnapshot
RateLimitSnapshot.description: Current distributed limiter state for one tenant/key.

tenant.description: Tenant/org whose quota is being enforced.

algorithm.description: Limiter algorithm that produced this snapshot.

allowed.description: Whether the most recent check was allowed.

remaining.description: Remaining units after the most recent check.

reset_ms.description: Approximate reset/refill time in ms since epoch.
